tickets.title: Project scaffold
tickets.description: Initialize monorepo with single package.json, TypeScript configs, Next.js config, .env.example, .gitignore, and README. Set up npm scripts including concurrently-based npm run dev that starts both Express backend and Next.js frontend.
requirements: MUST have single package.json at project root with all dependencies
MUST have tsconfig.json that passes npx tsc --noEmit on frontend code
MUST have next.config.mjs with /api/* rewrites to Express on port 3001
MUST have npm run dev starting both servers (Express port 3001 + Next.js port 3000) via concurrently
MUST have .env.example with DATABASE_URL defaulting to local Supabase
MUST have README.md documenting single start command
MUST have vitest.config.ts for backend unit tests
MUST have playwright.config.ts for E2E tests

tickets.title: Database schema and connection
tickets.description: Create PostgreSQL schema (events table, identity_map table with indexes). Implement db.ts connection pool using pg. Implement setup-db.ts that creates tables idempotently on startup. Schema supports identity resolution via device_id→user_id mapping.
requirements: MUST create events table with: id, event_name, device_id, user_id, timestamp, properties (JSONB), created_at
MUST create identity_map table with: device_id (PK), user_id, created_at, updated_at
MUST create indexes on events(event_name), events(timestamp DESC), events(device_id), events(user_id), identity_map(user_id)
MUST export a pg Pool instance from server/db.ts
MUST have initDb() function that creates tables using CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS
MUST use DATABASE_URL env var with fallback to local Supabase default

tickets.title: Event ingestion API and identity resolution — BR-100 + BR-101
tickets.description: Implement POST /api/events endpoint. Validate required fields (event_name + at least one of device_id/user_id). Accept optional timestamp (default to server time). Accept arbitrary key-value properties. Return clear errors on invalid events. Persist to PostgreSQL.
requirements: MUST accept POST /api/events with JSON body
MUST require event_name field — reject with 400 and clear error if missing
MUST require at least one identity field (device_id or user_id) — reject with 400 if both absent
MUST default timestamp to server time if not provided
MUST accept arbitrary properties as key-value pairs in properties field
MUST persist event to database
MUST return 201 with event id on success
MUST provide GET /api/events/names returning distinct event names
MUST provide GET /api/events/properties?event=<name> returning property keys and detected types

tickets.title: Sample data generator — BR-102
tickets.description: Implement POST /api/seed endpoint that populates database with realistic demo data: ≥10 event types, ≥50 resolved users, ≥10,000 events over 30 days. Non-uniform distribution. Include identity resolution scenarios: anonymous→identified, multi-device, never-identified. String and numeric properties.
requirements: MUST implement POST /api/seed endpoint
MUST generate ≥10 distinct event types
MUST generate ≥50 resolved users (have user_id)
MUST generate ≥10,000 total events
MUST spread events over last 30 days with non-uniform daily distribution
MUST include anonymous→identified scenarios (device_id only events, then later mapping to user_id)
MUST include multi-device users (multiple device_ids → same user_id)
MUST include never-identified users (device_id only, no mapping)
MUST include string properties (page, button, plan, feature) and numeric properties (amount, duration, quantity)
MUST be idempotent — DELETE existing data then re-insert
MUST return summary: { events: number, users: number, devices: number }

tickets.title: Application shell and navigation — BR-103
tickets.description: Implement Next.js app shell with Ant Design Layout. Navigation between Explorer, Trends, Funnels, Users sections. Dark/light theme toggle. Ant Design ConfigProvider with Mixpanel-inspired purple accent palette. AntdRegistry for Next.js SSR.
requirements: MUST implement root layout.tsx with AntdRegistry and ConfigProvider
MUST implement AppShell component with Ant Design Layout (Sider + Header + Content)
MUST have navigation links to: Explorer, Trends, Funnels, Users
MUST implement dark/light theme toggle using Ant Design theme tokens
MUST use Mixpanel-inspired color palette: purple primary (#722ED1 or similar), clean dark background in dark mode
MUST have no blank pages — every route renders something
MUST start with Next.js dev server on port 3000

tickets.title: Event Explorer — BR-200
tickets.description: Implement GET /api/explore endpoint (paginated, filterable) and Event Explorer page. Show reverse-chronological events with timestamp, name, resolved identity, properties. Filter by event name. Pagination for large volumes.
requirements: MUST implement GET /api/explore?event_name=&page=&limit= returning paginated events
MUST show timestamp, event name, resolved identity (user_id or device_id), and properties in each row
MUST use resolved identity (COALESCE with identity_map join)
MUST support filter by event name via dropdown
MUST implement pagination (50 events per page minimum)
MUST show loading state while fetching
MUST show empty state when no events match filter
MUST show error state if API fails

tickets.title: Trend Analysis — BR-201
tickets.description: Implement GET /api/trends endpoint and Trends page. Select event type → volume over time. Measures: total count, unique users (resolved). Time-series chart. Daily/weekly granularity. Date range presets (7d, 30d, 90d) + custom. Default: last 30 days, daily.
requirements: MUST implement GET /api/trends?event=&start=&end=&granularity=day|week&measure=count|unique_users
MUST compute unique users using resolved identity (COALESCE with identity_map join)
MUST return time-series array with period and value
MUST implement Trends page with event selector, date range picker, granularity toggle, measure selector
MUST render time-series chart using Recharts
MUST default to last 30 days, daily granularity, count measure
MUST implement date range presets: 7d, 30d, 90d
MUST show loading, empty, and error states

tickets.title: Numeric Aggregations — BR-300
tickets.description: Extend Trends with sum/avg/min/max on numeric properties. Auto-detect which event properties are numeric. Add aggregation controls to Trends page UI.
requirements: MUST extend GET /api/trends to accept aggregation=sum|avg|min|max and property=<name>
MUST auto-detect numeric properties for an event type (GET /api/events/properties returns type: 'number' | 'string')
MUST compute aggregation correctly in SQL using CAST and AVG/SUM/MIN/MAX
MUST add aggregation selector to Trends UI (only shown when numeric properties available)
MUST show loading, empty, error states for aggregation results

tickets.title: Comparative Visualization — BR-301
tickets.description: Add chart type switcher to Trends page. Minimum: line, bar, area charts. Sensible defaults (line for time series).
requirements: MUST add chart type toggle to Trends page: line, bar, area (minimum 3 types)
MUST default to line chart for time series data
MUST render each chart type correctly using Recharts
MUST preserve all other Trends controls when switching chart type

tickets.title: Dimensional Breakdown — BR-302
tickets.description: Extend Trends with breakdown by a property value. Show top N values + 'other' grouping. Works with all measures.
requirements: MUST extend GET /api/trends to accept breakdown=<property_name>
MUST return top 10 values + 'other' bucket in breakdown mode
MUST work with count, unique_users, and numeric aggregation measures
MUST add breakdown selector to Trends UI
MUST render multi-series chart when breakdown is active
MUST show loading, empty, error states

tickets.title: Funnel Analysis — BR-303
tickets.description: Implement POST /api/funnels and Funnels page. Define 2-5 event sequence. Show conversion rate between each step and overall. Uses resolved identities. Respects step order by timestamp.
requirements: MUST implement POST /api/funnels accepting { steps: string[], start: string, end: string }
MUST compute funnel using resolved identities (anonymous+identified = one user)
MUST require step order by timestamp (step N must occur after step N-1 for same user)
MUST return count and conversion rate for each step
MUST support 2-5 steps
MUST implement Funnels page with step builder (add/remove events)
MUST display funnel as visual drop-off chart
MUST show conversion percentages between steps
MUST show loading, empty, error states

tickets.title: User Profiles — BR-304
tickets.description: Implement GET /api/users and GET /api/users/:id, plus Users search page and User Profile page. Show identity cluster, full event timeline, first/last seen.
requirements: MUST implement GET /api/users?search=&page=&limit= returning paginated user list
MUST implement GET /api/users/:id returning full user profile
MUST include identity cluster in profile: all linked device_ids and user_id
MUST include full event timeline with merged anonymous events
MUST show first_seen and last_seen timestamps
MUST show event count
MUST implement Users search page with identity search
MUST implement User Profile page with timeline and identity cluster
MUST show loading, empty, error states on both pages

tickets.title: Visual Coherence — BR-305
tickets.description: Polish pass: consistent color palette, typography, chart labels. Verify empty states, loading indicators, error messages on all views. No blank pages, raw errors, or broken layouts.
requirements: MUST use consistent color palette across all views (purple primary, from Ant Design theme tokens)
MUST have consistent typography using Ant Design type system
MUST have chart labels on all Recharts components
MUST verify all views have loading state (Ant Design Spin or Skeleton)
MUST verify all views have empty state with helpful message
MUST verify all views have error state with user-friendly message (no raw errors)
MUST pass npx next build with zero errors
